notes.heading: Setup waits for the executable
notes.body: The app no longer treats SteamCMD's early manifest or partial files as a complete install. Setup unlocks only after the Dragonwilds server executable is detected.

notes.heading: No early INI warnings
notes.body: DedicatedServer.ini is no longer checked or patched while install/update is still running or before the server payload is ready.

notes.heading: Clearer partial install state
notes.body: When SteamCMD has started writing files but the install is not ready yet, the dashboard now shows an installing/incomplete state instead of asking for setup values.
